sqlMap.select: SELECT taskID, parentID, ownerID, creatorID, case when #primary# = 1 then creatorName else creatorName2 end as creatorName, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(createDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createDate, taskStatus, completeRate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(completeDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as completeDate, importance, hasShare, hasAttach, hasComment, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startDate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(endDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as endDate, repetition, repetitionDelete, repetitionStatus, title, contentPath, taskType, updateTime, newAnswer, newRefer, personID, personName, personName2, case when #primary# = 1 then personDeptName else personDeptName2 end as personDeptName, personAttach, personContentPath taskPersonID, case when #primary# = 1 then taskPersonName else taskPersonName2 end as taskPersonName FROM TBL_TASK WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
